summary: Collapsed the public-API auth env-var surface to a single canonical LUNCHMONEY_API_KEY and dropped the two operational env vars (LUNCH_MONEY_CONFIG, LUNCH_MONEY_BASE_URL). Trimmed manifest.json user_config to one required field so MCP clients do not demand the token five times.
reason: Generator's OR-case auth pattern emitted five aliases (LUNCHMONEY_ACCESS_TOKEN + four ecosystem aliases for lunchable/lunchtui/robshox MCP) for one bearer token, plus two operational env vars. User wanted minimal surface and did not need ecosystem-compat aliases. The four alias env vars and matching Config fields collapse to a single AccessToken field. LUNCH_MONEY_CONFIG was redundant with the existing --config flag. LUNCH_MONEY_BASE_URL was only used by tests for httptest server URLs and by the mock.lunchmoney.dev development path; tests now write base_url to a temp config TOML and pass --config <path> instead. Internal-API LUNCHMONEY_INTERNAL_COOKIE is unrelated and untouched. Closes Greptile finding #1 on PR #624 (5x required: true).
validated_outcome: go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./... pass.
